ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Continued To Jul-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Co-Executors and the Attorney to appear on July 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Final Report on Waiver of Accounting, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vivian Lerchy for Attorney Kristen Bargmeyer on behalf of Harrlyn Robinson-Lacy and Gaycia Parks (Executors).

Ms. Lerchy stated that the Attorney is out on maternity leave, that she needs two to three months, that they have solved collection of documents and did mediation a couple of weeks ago, and that they have made some progress. Ms. Lerchy also stated that the Attorney informed her that she can have everything done by the end of the year. Status on close of estate is continued to January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for December 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that it expects the inventory to be filed by that date.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
